messages.content: I am building a SaaS startup called Memoria AI and my goal is to launch the MVP and get 20 beta users in 30 days.

[Simulated Chief of Staff Agent Response]
I have analyzed your input: "I am building a SaaS startup called Memoria AI and my goal is to launch the MVP and get 20 beta users in 30 days.".

I will remember this details to assist you in future conversations. We will track these objectives and make sure your daily tasks align with your long-term goals. Let me know if you want me to extract specific action items or reflections from this!
For my project, I prefer using TypeScript, Next.js, and MongoDB Atlas because they allow us to build agentic memory architectures.
